output.sparql:
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?person ?personLabel ?age WHERE {
  ?person p:P39 [ ps:P39 wd:Q5724730 ; pq:P580 ?start ] .
  FILTER(?start >= "1952-01-01" ^^ xsd:date)
  .
  ?person wdt:P1327 wd:Q476 .
  ?person wdt:P102 ?party .
  ?person wdt:P569 ?birthDate .
  ?person wdt:P570 ?deathDate .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?person rdfs:label ?personLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?personLabel) = "en")
  }
  .
  BIND((YEAR(?deathDate) - YEAR(?birthDate)) AS ?age)
}
GROUP BY ?person ?personLabel ?birthDate ?deathDate ?age
HAVING(COUNT(DISTINCT ?party) > 1)
ORDER BY DESC(?age)
LIMIT 2
